title: bartsia litoralis
intro: Bartsia litoralis, also known as sea pink or Bartsia, is a perennial flowering plant native to coastal areas in the Northern Hemisphere. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bartsia litoralis include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Bartsia litoralis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
